title: Shenzi's PVP Pack
description: A Vanilla optimized PVP pack providing quality of life items and better vision without changing all of minecraft's textures!
body: Shenzi's PVP Pack is a mostly vanilla optimized PVP pack for PVP quality of life including lower weapons and utilities to better optimize player vision, no explosion or block breaking particles for also better view (including smaller totem pops). It is recomended you turn off water and lava fog within sodium extra settings if you wish for a better advantage!
